mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : ExamStarePaperDAO.insertReExamStarePaper 설 명 : 재시험 문항 출제 */
INSERT INTO TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_PAPER ( EXAM_ID , EXAM_QSTN_NO , STD_ID , QSTN_SEQNO , CNDDT_ID , QSTN_SEQ , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) WITH COPY_T(N) AS ( SELECT LEVEL FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 10 ) SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_QSTN_NO , #{stdNo} , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.QSTNS_TYCD = 'SAME' THEN A.QSTN_SEQNO ELSE DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE END) AS QSTN_SEQNO , 1 CNDDT_ID , ( SELECT LISTAGG('N', ',') WITHIN GROUP( ORDER BY CASE WHEN A.QSTN_RNDMYN = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE TO_CHAR(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE) END) FROM COPY_T ) AS QSTN_SEQ , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM ( SELECT A.EXAM_ID , A.EXAM_QSTN_NO , A.QSTN_SEQNO , A.CNDDT_ID , A.TTL , B.QSTNS_TYCD , NVL(B.QSTN_RNDMYN, 'N') AS QSTN_RNDMYN , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.QSTN_SEQNO ORDER BY CASE WHEN B.QSTNS_TYCD = 'SAME' THEN A.CNDDT_ID ELSE DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE END) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_QSTN A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON A.EXAM_ID = B.EXAM_ID WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} ) A WHERE A.RNUM = 1
